title: Plan F — PHPStan Fluency Cleanup Implementation Plan
summary: TDD-shaped plan to drain 18 PHPStan baseline entries to zero via 4 task categories (covariance docblocks, HasFactory generics, countByPeriod templates, misc dead code) across 8 files.
notes: Manifest type DOC is authoritative. Document is a shipped implementation plan with step-by-step TDD-shaped tasks, not a specification or decision record. No behavior changes; pure type-system fluency + dead-code cleanup.
